productDisplayName: Timberland Men's Saco River White T-shirt
description: CompositionWhite half sleeve t-shirt made of 100% organic cotton, with tape detailing on inseam of the neckline, ribbed neckline and has a distressed look graphic on the chest with embroidered letteringFittingRegularWash care Machine wash in cold water at 30 degree C Wash separately before wearing for the first time Wash dark colours separately only non-chlorine bleach when needed Tumble dry normal Warm iron Do not iron trim or decoration Do not dry clean If canoeing is your passion, then Saco River must be on your list! To show the world how adventurous you are, sport this white tee from timberland! The distressed graphic and the edgy lettering gives the tee a rugged look. Team it with jeans and get going!This shirt has been manufactured in an environment-friendly manner with the aim to reduce Carbon Footprint.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
